name: Weaver Leather Cotton Horse Lead Rope
description: Guide your pony around the paddock with comfort and ease using the Weaver Leather Cotton Horse Lead Rope. This heavy-duty cotton rope is made with a super-soft material that’s designed to prevent discomfort in your hand. A rust-resistant solid brass 225 snap hook provides strength and durability, while the braided and tied ends help reduce unravelling. The 5/8-inch rope measures a full 10 feet in length and comes in four primary colors to complement your tack and deliver years of dependable service.
